description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a sharply pointed nose and elongated, angular wings that taper to fine tips. The main body is predominantly blue with purple accents, and the wings exhibit a gradient from blue to purple, giving it a high-tech appearance. The aircraft has two prominent vertical stabilizers at the rear, and the engines are mounted at the back, visible as dark cylindrical units. The cockpit is centrally located and appears to be enclosed, with a dark-tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage. The underside of the wings and body are streamlined, with no visible landing gear, suggesting a design focused on speed and agility. The overall form is aerodynamic, with smooth surfaces and minimal external protrusions.
description: A sleek, blue and purple futuristic airplane with sharply pointed wings, rear-mounted engines, and an enclosed central cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, angular wings, and central cockpit with blue and purple color gradients.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, swept-back wings, rear-mounted engines, and the streamlined fuselage profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the angular tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same wing and engine configuration with visible surface details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and slight anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with an H-tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark-tinted canopy.
